prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson guild cloak with a broadsword at his hip and Mika Moonvale in a short guild cloak with visible training scars; Renji initiates a cooperative interaction by spreading a large, detailed quest map across a rustic wooden guild table, gesturing for Mika to inspect the marked route, cinematic lighting, bright anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; after ten seconds Mika Moonvale leans over the table to trace the path on the quest map with a finger, Renji Dawnblade nods in firm agreement as they both stow the map and prepare to depart, consistent identities and camera, no text, no watermark.
